label: Coda
description: Connect to Coda to read and write docs, tables, rows, and automations.

form.title: Connect Coda
form.subtitle: Paste your Coda API token to give Anton access to your docs and tables.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste a personal API token from your Coda account settings. No OAuth client setup required — fastest path to connect.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Coda API Token

1. Open [Coda](https://coda.io) and sign in.
2. Click your avatar in the top-right corner and select **Account settings**.
3. Scroll down to the **API tokens** section.
4. Click **Generate API token**, give it a name like `Anton`, and click **Generate**.
5. Copy the token shown — it will not be displayed again.
6. Paste it into the **API Token** field below.

## Notes

- The token grants access to all docs the account can see. Use a dedicated Coda account if you want to limit scope.
- If you lose the token, revoke it in the same **API tokens** panel and generate a new one.
- See [Coda API docs](https://coda.io/developers/apis/v1) for full details on what the API can access.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Found in Coda → Account settings → API tokens. Shown only once at generation time.
